message:
chore(review): cross-review of 2h swarm commits — no regressions detected

Reviewed 69 commits across the swarm window. Findings:
- 2 new clippy suppressions (cast_possible_truncation, cast_sign_loss) — both justified on bounds-checked datetime conversions
- Validation strengthened: previously-unbounded text fields now bounded (design, acceptance_criteria, notes, assignee, owner, created_by)
- No removed assertions — apparent removals were test refactoring (weaker → stronger)
- No unsafe code introduced, no deleted source files
- Key fixes verified correct: datetime floor-vs-trunc (a36aa4d), magnitude-aware epoch migration (0268d0b), content_hash Go parity (0d8fd47), blocked-cache FK escalation (67f6605)
- Error handling improved: FK-disabled state now escalates; import combined-error surfaced
- Net +2893 lines, overwhelmingly tests and hardening

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
